executive_summary.verdict: Ford is trading below BOTH Graham AND DCF - rare! But EV transition is risky and capital-intensive.
executive_summary.key_insight: Graham $20 and DCF $19 vs Price $8.50. Trading at 50%+ discount to ALL metrics.

graham.recommendation: 135% below Graham - exceptionally cheap by book value

peter_lynch.recommendation: Lynch not applicable for cyclical automakers

Note.analysis: Unlike GM, Ford has POSITIVE DCF!

ford_vs_gm.dcf_comparison: Ford DCF = +$19, GM DCF = -$16. Ford wins.
ford_vs_gm.ev_strategy: Ford more focused (F-150 Lightning, Mustang Mach-E)
ford_vs_gm.conclusion: Ford is the better value play among legacy automakers

risk_factors.ev_transition: Billions invested in EVs with uncertain returns
risk_factors.uaw_labor: Higher labor costs from UAW contract

bull_case.thesis: EV transition succeeds. F-150 Lightning dominates truck market. Dividend safe.

bear_case.thesis: EV money pit. Recession crushes sales. Dividend cut.

key_differentiator: Better than GM (positive DCF), but auto industry is risky
